---
name: 📚 Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, unclear, or incorrect documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## 📚 Documentation Issue

**What part of the documentation is affected?**

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] QUICKSTART.md
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] CLI command help
- [ ] Code comments/docstrings
- [ ] Other: **\_**

## 🔍 Issue Type

- [ ] **Missing**: Documentation doesn't exist
- [ ] **Unclear**: Documentation exists but is confusing
- [ ] **Incorrect**: Documentation is wrong or outdated
- [ ] **Incomplete**: Documentation is partial

## 📝 Description

**Please describe the documentation issue in detail.**

## 💡 Suggested Improvement

**How would you improve this documentation?**

## 📍 Location

**If applicable, provide a link or file path to the documentation.**

Example:

- File: `README.md`
- Section: "Quick Start"
- Line: 42

## 🎯 Impact

**Who is affected by this documentation issue?**

- [ ] New users trying to get started
- [ ] Experienced users looking for advanced features
- [ ] Contributors trying to understand the codebase
- [ ] API users integrating Aegis

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing documentation issues
- [ ] I am willing to submit a PR to improve this documentation

---

**Thank you for helping improve Aegis Box documentation! 🛡️**
